{{Event Header|StS2 Waterlogged Scriptorium.png}} {{E|Waterlogged Scriptorium|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Underdocks}}. == Options == {{Frame|Bloody Ink}} {{TS|positive||Gain 6 Max HP.}}
{{Frame|Tentacle Quill}} {{TS|negative||Pay 55 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||{{KW|Enchant||2}} a card with {{KW|Steady||2}}.}}
{{Frame|Prickly Sponge}} {{TS|negative||Pay 99 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||{{KW|Enchant||2}} 2 cards with {{KW|Steady||2}}.}} * Tentacle Quill and Prickly Sponge are locked if you don't have enough Gold. == Conditions == * Only appears if you have at least 55 Gold. == Dialogue ==
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a {{TS|blue||withered figure}} working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are stuffed full of damp scrolls and parchment. Noticing a patron has entered, the {{TS|blue||scribe-shopkeeper}} snaps to attention and gestures at some {{TS|gold||implements}} arranged on a desk.
{{Frame|Bloody Ink}}
The {{TS|blue||scribe}} carefully picks up the vial filled with a {{TS|red||bright red ink}} and gives it a shake, then gestures with their own hand a dipping motion. You dip your fingers into the ink and a {{TS|green|shake|jolt of vitality}} courses through you! Pleased with your reaction, the {{TS|blue||scribe}} gives a polite bow and waves you goodbye.
{{Frame|Tentacle Quill}}
The scribe lifts the wriggly quill and with swift, practiced movements, etches a strange mark unto your head. The mark glows bright, then vanishes...
{{Frame|Prickly Sponge}}
The scribe grabs the prickly sponge (it squeaks) and dabs it across your scrolls. *squeak squeak squeak* The prickly texture leaves behind shimmering marks that seem to stabilize the ink...
== Update History == * '''Early Access v0.103.2''' **Waterlogged Scriptorium changes from BETA branch were moved to the main version of the game. *'''Early Access v0.102.0 (BETA)''' **Changed Waterlogged Scriptorium event: **Prickly Sponge option gold cost lowered from 155 -> 99 **Tentacle Quill gold cost lowered from 65 -> 55 [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
